visual_description: At night, a group of men gather near a vintage car on a wet city street illuminated by streetlights. A close‑up shows a man in a suit and glasses looking to the side, then the scene shifts to a dark sedan with headlights on speeding past the camera. The car’s license plate reads FD 5519 as it moves across the illuminated road.
audio_description: Ambient city night sounds are audible, with faint traffic noise and the engine of the moving car.
